requestedAction: Prepare future Instagram OAuth connection readiness for @agdigitalz in connected_draft_only mode.
scope: This template is a readiness package only. If converted into an active approved lock later, it may allow AG OS to prepare for one future Instagram OAuth connection for @agdigitalz in connected_draft_only mode only. It does not start OAuth, connect Instagram, store credentials, post, schedule, pull analytics, use DMs/comments, activate n8n, call social APIs, use paid tools, change domain/DNS, touch Lead Gen, touch AI Receptionist, or change the Constitution.
revocationPath: This readiness package is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner says stop or revoke, the expiration passes, target handle differs from @agdigitalz, target platform differs from Instagram, connection mode differs from connected_draft_only, OAuth would start, credentials are required without a separate approved secure storage path, broader permissions are requested, live posting, scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, n8n activation, social API calls, paid tools, domain/DNS changes, customer data, production data, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution scope appears, validation or boot check fails, or the action expands beyond readiness planning.

evidence.reference: Current thread owner instruction requested Instagram OAuth Readiness Package v1 for @agdigitalz and explicitly forbids OAuth execution, account connection, credential storage, posting, scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, and n8n activation.

npm.cmd run dashboard:build, npm.cmd run dashboard:check, npm.cmd run validate, npm.cmd run boot:check, and node --test tests/*.test.mjs must pass before any future execution package can be considered.
